lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kete tere jeea jant sifat kareh din raat |
lines.english: So many of Your beings and creatures praise You day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੀਆ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ਕੇਵਡ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: keteea tereea kudaratee kevadd teree daat |
lines.english: You have so many Creative Powers, Lord; Your Bountiful Blessings are so Great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਰੂਪ ਰੰਗ ਕੇਤੇ ਜਾਤਿ ਅਜਾਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kete tere roop rang kete jaat ajaat |3|
lines.english: You have so many forms and colors, so many classes, high and low. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਚ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach milai sach aoopajai sach meh saach samaae |
lines.english: Meeting the True One, Truth wells up. The truthful are absorbed into the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa paatisaahu aape le milaae |4|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True King absorbs us into Himself. ||4||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਪਤਿ ਊਗਵੈ ਗੁਰਬਚਨੀ ਭਉ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: surat hovai pat aoogavai gurabachanee bhau khaae |
lines.english: Intuitive understanding is obtained and one is welcomed with honor, through the Guru's Word, filled with the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੀ ਸਰੀ ਜਿ ਉਬਰੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੁਈ ਘਰਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhalee saree ji ubaree haumai muee gharaahu |
lines.english: It all worked out-I was saved, and the egotism within my heart was subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਤ ਲਗੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਵੇਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: doot lage fir chaakaree satigur kaa vesaahu |
lines.english: The evil energies have been made to serve me, since I placed my faith in the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਪ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਬਾਦਿ ਹੈ ਸਚਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kalap tiaagee baad hai sachaa veparavaahu |1|
lines.english: I have renounced my useless schemes, by the Grace of the True, Carefree Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re sach milai bhau jaae |
lines.english: O mind, meeting with the True One, fear departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤਾ ਆਖਣੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਆਖਣਿ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ketaa aakhan aakheeai aakhan tott na hoe |
lines.english: How can we describe Him with words? There is no end to the descriptions of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਿਉ ਥੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bin nirbhau kiau theeai guramukh sabad samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, how can anyone become fearless? Become Gurmukh, and immerse yourself in the Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਜੀਅ ਪਰਾਣ ਹੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis ke jeea paraan hai man vasiai sukh hoe |2|
lines.english: He is the Giver of the soul, and the praanaa, the breath of life; when He dwells within the mind, there is peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਕੇਤੜੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mangan vaale ketarre daataa eko soe |
lines.english: There are so many beggars, but He is the only Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਸੁਪਨਾ ਬਾਜੀ ਬਨੀ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਖੇਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jag supanaa baajee banee khin meh khel khelaae |
lines.english: The world is a drama, staged in a dream. In a moment, the play is played out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਏਕਸੇ ਵਿਜੋਗੀ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sanjogee mil ekase vijogee utth jaae |
lines.english: Some attain union with the Lord, while others depart in separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaanaa so theeai avar na karanaa jaae |3|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him comes to pass; nothing else can be done. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਵੇਸਾਹੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh vasat vesaaheeai sach vakhar sach raas |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs purchase the Genuine Article. The True Merchandise is purchased with the True Capital.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਸਤੁ ਪਛਾਣਸੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਉਦਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak vasat pachhaanasee sach saudaa jis paas |4|11|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who stocks this True Merchandise shall recognize and realize the Genuine Article. ||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਵਣੰਜਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sach vananjiaa gur poore saabaas |
lines.english: Those who purchase this True Merchandise through the Perfect Guru are blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੁ ਗੁਲਾਲੁ ਗਹਬਰਾ ਸਚਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laal gulaal gahabaraa sachaa rang charraau |
lines.english: Like the poppies, they are dyed in the deep crimson color of Truthfulness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mehal 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਧਾਤੁ ਕਉ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaat milai fun dhaat kau sifatee sifat samaae |
lines.english: As metal merges with metal, those who chant the Praises of the Lord are absorbed into the Praiseworthy Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਧੇਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa gur paaeeai mukat padaarath dhen |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, the Guru is found. He is the Treasure of Liberation, the Source of all good fortune. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re sant janaa kee ren |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, become the dust of the feet of the humble Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਏਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach milai santokheea har jap ekai bhaae |1|
lines.english: Those contented souls who meditate on the Lord with single-minded love, meet the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਉ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਾ ਊਪਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aoochau thaan suhaavanaa aoopar mehal muraar |
lines.english: Upon that Highest Plane of Sublime Beauty, stands the Mansion of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh man samajhaaeeai aatam raam beechaar |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs train their minds to contemplate the Lord, the Supreme Soul. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਦੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਦਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach karanee de paaeeai dar ghar mehal piaar |
lines.english: By true actions, this human body is obtained, and the door within ourselves which leads to the Mansion of the Beloved, is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਈਅਹਿ ਆਸ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tribidh karam kamaaeeeh aas andesaa hoe |
lines.english: By actions committed under the influence of the three qualities, hope and anxiety are produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਕੁਟੀ ਛੁਟਸੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiau gur bin trikuttee chhuttasee sehaj miliai sukh hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, how can anyone be released from these three qualities? Through intuitive wisdom, we meet with Him and find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਮਲੁ ਧੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nij ghar mehal pachhaaneeai nadar kare mal dhoe |3|
lines.english: Within the home of the self, the Mansion of His Presence is realized when He bestows His Glance of Grace and washes away our pollution. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਉ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur mail na utarai bin har kiau ghar vaas |
lines.english: Without the Guru, this pollution is not removed. Without the Lord, how can there be any homecoming?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਅਵਰ ਤਿਆਗੈ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: eko sabad veechaareeai avar tiaagai aas |
lines.english: Contemplate the One Word of the Shabad, and abandon other hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਿਖਾਈਐ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਸੁ ॥੪॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak dekh dikhaaeeai hau sad balihaarai jaas |4|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am forever a sacrifice to the one who beholds, and inspires others to behold Him. ||4||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਰ ਕੇਰੀ ਕੰਧ ਜਿਉ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਕਿਰਿ ਢਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kalar keree kandh jiau ahinis kir dteh paae |
lines.english: Like a wall of sand, day and night, she crumbles, and eventually, she breaks down altogether.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਮੁਠੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig jeevan dohaaganee mutthee doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The life of the discarded bride is cursed. She is deceived by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਪਿਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai sukh naa theeai pir bin dookh na jaae |1|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, peace does not come. Without her Husband Lord, her suffering does not end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧੇ ਪਿਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਆ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mundhe pir bin kiaa seegaar |
lines.english: O soul-bride, without your Husband Lord, what good are your decorations?
